image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Pain isn't a straight shot to your brain.
Context visual: It's the spinal cord that holds the key to what you feel.
Escalation visual: This is known as the gate control theory of pain.
Evidence visual: When you rub a sore spot, you're activating nerve fibers that can block pain signals.
Payoff visual: So, that simple act of rubbing can literally turn down the volume on pain.
Cta visual: Like this? Hit follow for more surprising science!
